title: Device Home Screen - Bluetooth turned off
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app correctly reflects headset connection status when Bluetooth is toggled off and back on via phone settings
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone.
2. Ensure the headset is paired and connected to the phone via Bluetooth. Verify the headset appears as 'Connected' on the Home screen device list.
3. Turn off Bluetooth on the phone (via Quick Settings or phone Settings → Bluetooth → Off).
4. Observe the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen device list.
5. Turn Bluetooth back on on the phone.
6. Go to phone Settings → Bluetooth, find the headset in the paired devices list, and tap to reconnect.
7. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen and observe the device list.
expected: Step 4: The headset is shown as 'Disconnected' in the Poly Studio Mobile app device list. Step 7: The headset is shown as 'Connected' in the Poly Studio Mobile app device list.
